productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Red Wallets
description: Urban girls can't get enough of bold accents and this is the key to a memorable look. Update your wardrobe with this stylish wallet from United Colours Of Benetton. Dimensions : 19 cm X 2 cmMade of 100% polyurethane on the outside and 100% polyester on the inside for durabilityHas one main zippered compartment with two partitions On one side is a sub compartment and four credit card slotsOn the other side is a sub compartment for business cards and two transparent slots for id cardsOne zippered sub-compartment in the middle for coinsThick grain print Stitch detailing for enhanced durabilityBrand name with mettalic decoration appliqued on the frontCareDo not wash, bleach,iron,dry clean or tumble dryRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
